tools.name: movscript_create_draft
tools.description: Create a local draft. Set proposal:true to enter the proposal workflow: schema validation runs automatically, target/source are inferred, and the draft becomes eligible for the dry-run apply loop (movscript_update_draft action='preview_apply'). Without proposal:true creates a plain draft. The kind field selects the draft schema.

tools.name: movscript_read_draft
tools.description: Read a local draft file by absolute file path and return its content plus metadata.

tools.name: movscript_get_draft
tools.description: Read a local draft by id. Returns content, metadata, status, and the local validation result.

tools.name: movscript_list_drafts
tools.description: List local drafts for the current or specified project, optionally filtered by kind or status. Use to find an existing draft before creating a new one.

tools.name: movscript_update_draft
tools.description: Edit, validate, or dry-run one local draft. Actions: 'patch_content' (JSON Pointer add/replace/remove), 'replace_text' (old/new string), 'replace_content' (full body), 'replace_fields' (title/status/metadata), 'set_status', 'validate' (local schema only), and 'preview_apply' (dry-run that surfaces local validation errors plus backend apply diffs/errors). The recommended self-healing loop: edit -> preview_apply -> inspect validation/backendError -> patch and re-preview until ok=true.

tools.name: movscript_request_user_input
tools.description: Pause the current agent run and ask the user for missing context, a choice, confirmation, or free-form input. Use this when the next step would be a guess.

tools.name: movscript_create_script
tools.description: Create a formal script record in the current project after user approval. Use this only when the user wants the generated script saved into the project.
